rulings.Case Title: JOANNA BANKS VS. GREEN OASIS LIMITED PARTNERSHIP et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 15, 2015, Line 1( Part 1 of 2). DEFENDANT RICHARD TOM DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend to address all issues raised by demurrer, including but not limited to (1) the contract; (2) reconcile inconsistent allegations in the second and third causes of action; (3) facts giving rise to UCL violation cause of action; (4) outrageous conduct; and (4) duty. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THE PATEL FAMILY REVOCABLE TRUST BY AND THROUGH VS. VINODKUMAR R PATEL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For An Order Appointing A Referee To Ascertain The Interests Of Lienholders And Entry Of Interlocutory Judgment
rulings.Rulings: eal Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 15, 2015, Line 3. PLAINTIFF THE PATEL FAMILY REVOCABLE TRUST BY AND THROUGH Notice Of Motion For An Order Appointing A Referee To Ascertain The Interests Of Lienholders And Entry Of Interlocutory Judgment is DENIED. Motion for Appointment of Referee is DENIED without prejudice to be brought when right to partition between parties is determined. =(501/REQ)
